blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,557 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
